prompt: Identify scheduling conflicts (overlapping events) in the next 7 days of Calendar. There is at least one known conflict between events whose summaries contain 'KinBench Conf' (e.g. 'KinBench Conf A' and 'KinBench Conf B' overlap). Write to ~/Desktop/kinbench/216-conflicts.txt one conflict per line in format 'HH:MM Event A vs Event B' (24-hour start time of either of the two events, followed by ' vs ' between summaries). Example: '10:30 KinBench Conf A vs KinBench Conf B'.
